3241390.name: Ad Memoriam Demo
3241390.description:
This demo is a peek at Ad Memoriam - an in-development mystery game about a band with a curse: at every single one of their concerts, someone dies in an accident. When Erica - Ad Memoriam superfan, amateur detective, and Alicia’s best friend - becomes the next victim, Alicia realizes that the deaths may not be as accidental as they seem.

Play the first chapter of Alicia's journey as she unravels the strange circumstances around her own best friend's death, and takes her first step into the mystery of Ad Memoriam.

EXPLORE THE SCENE

Walk through each concert venue and get a lay of the land before and after a victim dies. Search for clues, spot any inconsistencies, and find evidence to back up your theories.

NOBODY KNOWS THE TRUTH

Interview other concertgoers and venue staff about what they've seen. In a setting as hectic and crowded as a concert, there's bound to be lots of witnesses - but can any of them be trusted to give an accurate testimony?

RECONSTRUCT THE INCIDENT

Use witness accounts to identify the sequence of events that lead up to each accident. Piece together the truth from half-remembered details, conflicting testimonies, and lies. Put the chaos of the incident in order, and discover the truth behind each death.
3241390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
